reconfigure.title: Update the soundbar connection
reconfigure.description: Use this after the soundbar's IP address changes.

error.cannot_connect: Couldn't reach the soundbar. Check the host/IP and that IP control is enabled on the device.

abort.already_in_progress: A configuration flow for this soundbar is already in progress.
abort.wrong_device: This is a different soundbar than the one currently configured here. Use "Add integration" to add it separately instead.
